summary: Iteration 62: Complete Workflow Testing - 33/33 tests PASSED (100%). Verified full workflow from case creation to completion through all 5 phases for both student-created and incharge-created cases. All approval comments are correctly saved.
critical_code_review_comments: Complete student workflow verified: Create → Save implant plan → Request Phase 1 → Supervisor approves → Incharge approves → Phase 1 approved
Phase 2 workflow verified: Submit with array healing_abutment_cuff_height → Supervisor approves → Incharge approves → Phase 2 approved
Phase 3 workflow verified: Submit → Supervisor approves → Incharge approves → stage2_surgical_approved
Phase 4 Step 1 workflow verified: Submit with checklist.items format → Supervisor approves → Incharge approves → stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved
Phase 4 Step 2 workflow verified: Submit → Supervisor approves → Incharge approves → completed
All approval comments correctly saved as phase{N}_supervisor_notes and phase{N}_incharge_notes
Incharge self-approval workflow verified: Single approval call auto-approves both supervisor and incharge roles
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All approval workflows verified. Key findings: (1) Phase 4 Step 1 checklist requires items: List[ChecklistItem] format with {label, value} objects, (2) Incharge self-approval requires only ONE approval call (auto-approves both roles), (3) Status progression: draft → pending_phase1 → phase1_approved → pending_phase2 → phase2_approved → pending_stage2_surgical → stage2_surgical_approved → pending_stage2_prosthetic → stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved → pending_final_delivery → completed

tested_features.verify_all_comments_saved: PASS - All 10 approval comments verified on procedure document
tested_features.incharge_self_approve_phase1: PASS - Single call auto-approves both roles

tested_endpoints.GET /api/users: 200 - Returns list of users with IDs
tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/{id}: 200 - Returns procedure with all approval notes
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2: 200 - Saves healing_abutment_cuff_height (array or string) in phase2_data
